title: Poikilospermum dubium
taxonomy: Poikilospermum dubium is classified in the family Phyllanthaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the Phyllanthus family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its position in the taxonomic hierarchy. Poikilospermum dubium is further classified as a genus within the family, with the species name dubium indicating its unique characteristics. The classification of Poikilospermum dubium is a subject of ongoing research and may be subject to revision as new information becomes available. Poikilospermum dubium's classification is an important aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.

It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating wounds, infections, and other skin conditions.
